fields.content_zh: 腾讯云在全球运营 22 个地理区域、64 个可用区，海外覆盖东南亚、东北亚、欧洲、北美、南美、中东共 9 个区域。
fields.content_en: Tencent Cloud operates 22 geographic regions and 64 availability zones globally, spanning nine international regions across Southeast Asia, Northeast Asia, Europe, North America, South America and the Middle East.

evidence.claim: 腾讯云在22个地区运营64个可用区
evidence.quote: "Tencent Cloud International operates 64 availability zones spread across 22 regions globally."

fields.content_zh: 合作伙伴云覆盖包括泰国。True IDC 与腾讯云已签署战略合作备忘录，共同推进泰国本地云服务。
fields.content_en: Partner-cloud coverage includes Thailand. True IDC and Tencent Cloud have signed a strategic MOU to advance in-country cloud services.

evidence.claim: True IDC与腾讯云已签署战略合作备忘录
evidence.quote: True Internet Data Center Co., Ltd. (True IDC), Thailand’s leading provider of data center and cloud services, has announced the signing of a landmark Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Tencent Cloud International Pte. Ltd. (Tencent Cloud) in Shenzhen, China.

fields.content_zh: 同地域内多可用区(AZ)部署 + 跨地域容灾，AZ 之间通过低延迟专用网络互联，物理独立供电与网络。
fields.content_en: Multi-AZ deployment within a region plus cross-region disaster recovery. AZs are interconnected via low-latency dedicated networks, each with independent power and networking.

evidence.claim: 公开案例证实TCE支持双活/多活容灾架构
evidence.quote: 澎门财政局依托腾讯专有云TCE全栈产品构建“三中心两区域”双活数据中心架构，支撑智慧财政平台稳定运行。

fields.content_zh: TCE 专有云支持“两地三中心”双活/多活数据中心架构，客户可在其主权环境内自建同城/异地容灾。
fields.content_en: Tencent Cloud Enterprise supports a two-city, three-center active-active or multi-active data-center architecture, letting customers build same-city or geo-redundant disaster recovery within their own sovereign environment.

evidence.claim: 公开案例证实TCE支持双活/多活容灾架构
evidence.quote: 澎门财政局依托腾讯专有云TCE全栈产品构建“三中心两区域”双活数据中心架构，支撑智慧财政平台稳定运行。

fields.content_zh: 腾讯云全球骨干网络，200T+全球带宽储备、3200+全球加速节点，提供低延迟高稳定的全球连接。
fields.content_en: A global backbone network with more than 200T of reserved bandwidth and 3,200-plus global acceleration nodes delivers low-latency, high-stability connectivity worldwide.

evidence.claim: 腾讯云披露200T+带宽储备与3200+全球加速节点
evidence.quote: 具备 200T+全球带宽储备与3200+全球加速节点，实现高效数据传输。

fields.content_zh: TCE 私有化部署下，网络可由客户自建，也可通过专线/VPN 与中心云互通，形成云边协同架构。
fields.content_en: Under a TCE private deployment, the network can be customer-built, or connected to the central cloud via dedicated line or VPN, forming a cloud-edge collaborative architecture.

evidence.claim: 腾讯云披露200T+带宽储备与3200+全球加速节点
evidence.quote: 具备 200T+全球带宽储备与3200+全球加速节点，实现高效数据传输。

fields.content_en: Yes, delivered through Tencent Cloud SGX confidential computing as an optional capability, with remote-attestation service deployed across Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Nanjing and Singapore.

evidence.claim: SGX机密计算能力及其部署地域
evidence.quote: 腾讯云SGX远程证明服务部署在北京、上海、广州、南京、新加坡地域。

fields.content_zh: TCE 可集成同等机密计算能力，具体依客户部署架构而定。
fields.content_en: TCE can integrate equivalent confidential-computing capability, depending on the customer's deployment architecture.

evidence.claim: SGX机密计算能力及其部署地域
evidence.quote: 腾讯云SGX远程证明服务部署在北京、上海、广州、南京、新加坡地域。

fields.content_zh: 是，通过 Tencent Cloud KMS 提供密钥全生命周期管理及信封加密方案，传输层采用 TLS 加密，确保核心数据安全。
fields.content_en: Yes. Tencent Cloud KMS provides full key-lifecycle management with envelope encryption, and TLS secures data in transit.

evidence.claim: KMS信封加密能力
evidence.quote: Tencent Cloud KMS支持生成、存储、使用及终止密钥，提供信封加密方案，确保核心数据安全。

fields.content_zh: TCE 同源架构下提供同等加密能力，客户可自管密钥(CMEK)。
fields.content_en: Under TCE's same-source architecture, equivalent encryption is available, with customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK).

evidence.claim: KMS信封加密能力
evidence.quote: Tencent Cloud KMS支持生成、存储、使用及终止密钥，提供信封加密方案，确保核心数据安全。

fields.content_en: Yes. TCE supports a fully air-gapped private-cloud deployment model for the highest tier of isolation requirements.

evidence.quote: Its standardized governance enables full-process management and multiteam collaboration based on CI/CD standards and unified API services, while it supports both public cloud and private air-gapped environments.

fields.content_zh: 是。公有云基础设施运营同时受腾讯总部及区域合规要求约束，并通过德国C5、新加坡MTCS T3、韩国K-ISMS等区域认证；CSA注册表另列示STAR二级第三方审计与CCMv4认证。
fields.content_en: Yes. Public-cloud operations are governed by Tencent's home-jurisdiction requirements and regional compliance regimes, evidenced by Germany's C5, Singapore's MTCS T3 and Korea's K-ISMS. The independent CSA registry also lists a STAR Level 2 third-party audit and CCMv4 certification.

evidence.claim: 腾讯云已获德国C5/新加坡MTCS T3/韩国K-ISMS等区域合规认证
evidence.quote: 德国C5审计：通过2020版C5:2020基线审计，满足德国及欧盟GDPR等法规要求。新加坡MTCS T3认证：通过最高级别(T3)认证。韩国K-ISMS认证：腾讯云是中国首家通过韩国K-ISMS认证的云服务商。

evidence.claim: CSA独立注册表列示腾讯云的STAR二级第三方审计与CCMv4认证
evidence.quote: STAR Level 2 Third-Party Audit; Cloud Controls Matrix STAR Certification (CCMv4)

fields.content_zh: 是，合作伙伴云按本地部署与本地数据驻留模式设计。True IDC 与腾讯云在泰国发布了本地交互式AI云平台，并提供数据留存在泰国境内的选项；具体法律义务仍以当地实体和合同为准。
fields.content_en: Yes, the partner-cloud model is designed for in-country deployment and data residency. In Thailand, True IDC and Tencent Cloud announced an in-country interactive and AI-enabled cloud platform with an option to keep data in the country. Exact legal obligations remain subject to the local entity and contract.

evidence.claim: True IDC与腾讯云发布泰国本地云平台
evidence.quote: the first in-country interactive and AI-enabled cloud platform in Thailand

evidence.claim: 该平台提供将数据留存在泰国境内的选项
evidence.quote: an option to secure their data in the country.

fields.content_zh: TCE 私有化部署下，运营主体和合规主体为客户自身，天然适用本地法律法规。

fields.content_zh: 由腾讯云团队远程按标准运维流程实施更新与缺陷修复。
fields.content_en: Updates and bug fixes are implemented remotely by the Tencent Cloud team under standard operating procedures.

fields.content_zh: TCE 支持客户自主排期更新，air-gapped 环境下可采用离线包方式人工升级。
fields.content_en: TCE lets customers schedule updates on their own timeline; in air-gapped environments, upgrades can be applied manually via offline packages.

fields.content_zh: 仅限腾讯云授权人员访问。
fields.content_en: Access is restricted to authorized Tencent Cloud personnel.

fields.content_zh: TCE 环境下完全由客户自主管控访问权限，腾讯默认无访问权限。
fields.content_en: In a TCE environment, access is controlled entirely by the customer; Tencent has no default access.

fields.content_zh: 全球统一支持体系。
fields.content_en: A unified global support organization.

fields.content_zh: TCE 提供本地一线支持，复杂/技术性问题升级至腾讯全球技术团队处理。
fields.content_en: TCE provides local first-line support, with complex or technical issues escalated to Tencent's global technical team.

fields.content_zh: 腾讯云及经授权客户管理员共同拥有管理员权限。
fields.content_en: Administrator access is shared between Tencent Cloud and authorized customer administrators.

fields.content_zh: TCE 环境下由客户自主决定管理员权限分配，腾讯默认无管理员访问权限，需客户明确授权。
fields.content_en: In a TCE environment, administrator-access allocation is decided by the customer; Tencent has no default administrator access unless explicitly granted.

fields.content_zh: 默认使用腾讯云 CAM 身份与访问管理体系。
fields.content_en: Identity is managed by default through Tencent Cloud's CAM identity and access management system.

fields.content_zh: TCE 支持客户使用自有身份认证方案并自主管理。
fields.content_en: TCE supports customers bringing and managing their own identity solution.

fields.content_zh: 全球化安全运营中心(SOC)团队负责安全响应。
fields.content_en: Security response is handled by a global Security Operations Center (SOC) team.

fields.content_zh: TCE 部署下可按客户要求实现安全响应团队本地化配置。
fields.content_en: Under TCE, the security-response team can be localized to meet customer requirements.

fields.content_zh: 大部分服务可用，部分高级AI/新兴服务可能因技术或监管原因存在区域限制。
fields.content_en: Most services are available; certain advanced AI or emerging services may carry regional restrictions for technical or regulatory reasons.

fields.content_zh: 合作伙伴云模式下的服务范围受限于伙伴解决方案覆盖能力。
fields.content_en: Under the partner-cloud model, service scope is bounded by the partner's own solution coverage.

fields.content_zh: 腾讯云的主权云方案以 Tencent Cloud Enterprise(TCE)专有云为核心，围绕数据主权、运营主权、技术主权三大维度构建全栈解决方案。TCE与腾讯公有云架构同源、代码一致，支持公有、私有、混合及完全物理隔离(air-gapped)等多种部署模式，客户可根据监管要求灵活选择。在《The Forrester Wave: Sovereign Cloud Platforms, Q2 2026》报告中，腾讯云凭借TCE被评为“领导者(Leader)”象限，是唯一获评的中国厂商，同时获得“Customer Favorite”认可，在主权数据治理服务维度获得满分。
fields.content_en: Sovereignty is treated as a risk management framework, not a compliance checkbox. Tencent Cloud Enterprise (TCE) is the core of Tencent Cloud's sovereign cloud approach, built around data sovereignty, operational sovereignty and technical sovereignty in all their different forms — public, private, hybrid and fully air-gapped deployment, sharing the same source-code architecture as the public cloud so customers are not trading capability for isolation. In The Forrester Wave: Sovereign Cloud Platforms, Q2 2026, Tencent Cloud was named a Leader on the strength of TCE, the only Chinese hyperscaler in that quadrant, and was recognized as a Customer Favorite with the highest possible score on Sovereign Data Governance Services.

evidence.claim: 腾讯云公告称Forrester Wave将其列为主权云领导者并标注Customer Favorite
evidence.quote: Tencent Cloud is recognized as a Leader in the Sovereign Cloud market...Tencent Cloud is designated as a "Customer Favorite."

evidence.claim: 腾讯云报告落地页披露主权数据治理服务维度获得最高分
evidence.quote: Tencent Cloud received the highest possible score in the Sovereign Data Governance Services criterion.

evidence.claim: 独立行业媒体对Forrester Wave的公开摘要亦将腾讯云列入Leader组
evidence.quote: Among the leaders are Google Cloud, Microsoft, Amazon Web Services, Oracle, and Tencent Cloud.

fields.content_zh: 腾讯云将AI能力深度集成至TCE云底座，支持客户在主权合规框架内构建大模型训练、推理及Agent应用，实现“合规云”与“智能云”的统一落地。通过Agent Development Platform(ADP)等平台，企业可在本地化、隔离环境中部署基于混元大模型的AI应用，满足数据不出境、模型可控的监管要求。
fields.content_en: Sovereign AI is framed around the economics and control of the model layer, not just where data sits. Tencent Cloud integrates AI capability directly into the TCE cloud foundation, so customers can run large-model training, inference and agent workloads inside the same sovereign compliance boundary as the rest of their infrastructure. Through the Agent Development Platform (ADP), enterprises deploy Hunyuan-based AI applications in localized, isolated environments that keep data in-jurisdiction and the model itself under customer control.

evidence.claim: TCE已将AI能力集成至云底座
evidence.quote: By integrating advanced AI capabilities, Tencent Cloud Enterprise provides customers with a secure and compliant path for digital transformation.

fields.content_zh: 核心差异化是“同源而不降级”：TCE专有云与腾讯公有云共享统一架构和代码，使客户在私有化或物理隔离环境中获得持续迭代的云能力，而不是以功能缩水换取主权控制。该主张由三层证据支撑：TCE同源架构的产品事实、Forrester Wave Leader组的独立市场认可，以及True IDC泰国合作所体现的本地交付能力。
fields.content_en: The differentiator is sovereignty without a downgraded cloud. TCE and Tencent Cloud's public service share one architecture and codebase, so customers retain a continuously evolving cloud capability in private or air-gapped environments rather than trading functionality for control. The claim is supported at three levels: the same-source product architecture, independent recognition in the Forrester Wave Leader group, and in-country execution through the True IDC partnership in Thailand.

evidence.quote: 架构同源：将公有云能力1:1完全输送至私有环境，统一架构、统一代码，支持从十几台到上万台节点的平滑扩展。
